subject: fix: resolve pre-existing TypeScript errors in FuelMap and usePWAUpdate
body:
FuelMap.tsx: Camera ref type was too narrow — CameraRef has many methods
we don't use, causing assignability errors. Switched to `any` ref.

usePWAUpdate.ts: currentSW/currentHandler were declared inside the async
register() function but referenced in the useEffect cleanup (outer scope),
causing TS2304 "Cannot find name" errors. Hoisted to the effect scope.

Tags: fix, typescript
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: bulk-import
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_016TH1ngDtxc1chAu7S7eU74
title: resolve pre-existing TypeScript errors in FuelMap and usePWAUpdate
